test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_nested_lc_functions ( id UInt64, arr_lc Array(LowCardinality(String)), map_key_lc Map(LowCardinality(String), String), map_value_lc Map(String, LowCardinality(String)) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO perf_nested_lc_functions SELECT number AS id, arrayMap(x -> concat('k', toString((id + x) % 128)), range(16)) AS arr_lc, mapFromArrays( arrayMap(x -> concat('k', toString((id + x) % 128)), range(16)), arrayMap(x -> concat('v', toString((id + x) % 128)), range(16))) AS map_key_lc, mapFromArrays( arrayMap(x -> concat('k', toString((id + x) % 128)), range(16)), arrayMap(x -> concat('v', toString((id + x) % 128)), range(16))) AS map_value_lc FROM numbers(1000000)
